title: Water/Ice Cover S1 2016-present (raster 60 m), Europe, daily
description: The Water and Ice Cover by Sentinel-1 (WICS1) product is generated in near real-time at European scale, based on synthetic aperture radar data from the Sentinel-1 constellation. The product provides the river and lake area covered by snow-covered or snow-free ice with a spatial resolution of 60 m x 60 m.

links.title: Legal notice on the use of Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data
Homepage of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service

cdse-s3.title: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem S3
cdse-s3.description: This endpoint provides access to EO data which is stored on the object storage of both CloudFerro Cloud and OpenTelekom Cloud (OTC). See the [documentation](https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html) for more information, including how to get credentials.

creodias-s3.title: CREODIAS S3
creodias-s3.description: Comprehensive Earth Observation Data (EODATA) archive offered by CREODIAS as a commercial part of CDSE, designed to provide users with access to a vast repository of satellite data without predefined quota limits

QAFLAGS.title: Quality Flags (QAFLAGS)
QAFLAGS.description: Bitmask layer with pixel quality flags

classification:bitfields.name: temporary_water
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is located within a temporary water area, according to the EU-Hydro database.

classes.name: not_temporary_water
classes.description: The pixel is not located within a temporary water area.

classes.name: temporary_water
classes.description: The pixel is located within a temporary water area.

classification:bitfields.name: standing_or_uncategorized_water
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is located within a standing water area or an uncategorized water body, according to the EU-Hydro database.

classes.name: not_standing_or_uncategorized_water
classes.description: The pixel is not located within a standing water area nor an uncategorized water body.

classes.name: standing_or_uncategorized_water
classes.description: The pixel is located within a standing water area or an uncategorized water body.

classification:bitfields.name: temperature_data
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the algorithm had access to air temperature data to filter potential false alarms.

classes.name: not_temperature_data
classes.description: The algorithm had no access to air temperature data.

classes.name: temperature_data
classes.description: The algorithm had access to air temperature data.

classification:bitfields.name: summer_day
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the algorithm assessed that the acquisition was made in summer day conditions with a very low probability of ice presence, based on air temperature data.

classes.name: not_summer_day
classes.description: The air temperature data do not allow to assess the probability of ice being present.

classes.name: summer_day
classes.description: The probability of ice presence was assessed as very low by the algorithm, on the basis of the air temperature conditions.

classification:bitfields.name: imperviousness
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is located within an impervious area.

classes.name: not_imperviousness
classes.description: The pixel is not located within an impervious area.

classes.name: imperviousness
classes.description: The pixel is located within an impervious area.

classification:bitfields.name: tree_cover_density
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is located within an area of high-density tree cover.

classes.name: not_tree_cover_density
classes.description: The pixel is not located within an area of high-density tree cover.

classes.name: tree_cover_density
classes.description: The pixel is located within an area of high-density tree cover.

classification:bitfields.name: grassland
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is located within a grassland area.

classes.name: not_grassland
classes.description: The pixel is not located within a grassland area.

classes.name: grassland
classes.description: The pixel is located within a grassland area.

classification:bitfields.name: wind_speed_data
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the algorithm had access to wind speed data in order to assess the suitability of Sentinel-1 satellite data for ice detection.

classes.name: not_wind_speed_data
classes.description: The algorithm had no access to wind speed data.

classes.name: wind_speed_data
classes.description: The algorithm had access to wind speed data.

classification:bitfields.name: windy
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the algorithm assessed strong wind conditions that could lead to false alarms regarding ice cover.

classes.name: not_windy
classes.description: The wind speed data do not allow to assess the probability of false alarms regarding ice cover.

classes.name: windy
classes.description: The probability of false alarms regarding ice cover is high in relation to wind speed.

classification:bitfields.name: inland_water
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is part of a water body according to the water mask used as input

classes.name: not_inland_water
classes.description: The pixel is not part of a water body.

classes.name: inland_water
classes.description: The pixel is part of a water body.

WIC.title: Water/ice cover
WIC.description: Water/ice cover classification within the extent of a water mask

WIC-QA.title: Quality layer for the water/ice cover (WIC) layer
WIC-QA.description: Quality layer providing basic assessment of the water/ice cover layer.
